hero.subtitle: Fleet is an open-source, multi-tenant PaaS built on Docker Swarm. Self-host your own Heroku/Vercel alternative with full control over your infrastructure.

features.label: Features
features.title: Everything you need to run your platform
features.subtitle: Fleet provides a complete toolkit for deploying and managing containerized applications with enterprise-grade features built in.

dockerSwarm.title: Docker Swarm Orchestration
dockerSwarm.description: Deploy, scale, and manage services across your cluster with native Docker Swarm integration.

multiTenant.title: Multi-Tenant Architecture
multiTenant.description: Full account isolation, role-based access control, and team management out of the box.

billing.title: Built-in Billing
billing.description: Stripe integration with flexible plans, usage-based pricing, and automated invoicing.

domains.title: Domain Management
domains.description: DNS zones, automatic SSL certificates, and integrated domain purchases.

ssh.title: SSH Access
ssh.description: Secure terminal access to your running containers directly from the browser.

backups.title: Automated Backups
backups.description: Scheduled backups with NFS storage support and one-click restore.

marketplace.title: Marketplace
marketplace.description: One-click application templates to deploy popular services in seconds.

monitoring.title: Real-time Monitoring
monitoring.description: Node metrics, audit logs, and instant notifications for your infrastructure.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free and scale as you grow. All plans include the full Fleet platform.

cta.title: Ready to deploy your infrastructure?
cta.subtitle: Get started with Fleet in minutes. Deploy on your own servers and take full control of your platform.

footer.builtWith: Built with Vue, Hono, Docker Swarm
